_comment: Maps internal experiment codes and analysis codes to manuscript-facing names. Use these labels in figure titles, legends, and captions — never the raw internal codes.

figure_files.figure_m2_embedding_distance.png: M2 — Uniform scaling sensitivity analysis (embedding distance)
figure_files.figure_m4a_embedding_umap.png: M4a — Embedding compactness and family-clustering analysis (UMAP)
figure_files.figure_m4a_quantitative.png: M4a — Embedding compactness and family-clustering analysis (quantitative)
figure_files.figure_m4b_atomic_umap_combined.png: M4b — Site-resolved atomic embedding analysis (atomic UMAP, combined)
figure_files.figure_m4b_atomic_umap_exp7a.png: M4b — Site-resolved atomic embedding analysis (atomic UMAP, multi-task baseline)
figure_files.figure_m4b_atomic_umap_exp7c.png: M4b — Site-resolved atomic embedding analysis (atomic UMAP, single-task pretrained variant)
figure_files.figure_m4b_coupling.png: M4b — Site-resolved atomic embedding analysis (site coupling)
figure_files.figure_m4b_pca_anova.png: M4b — Site-resolved atomic embedding analysis (PCA ANOVA)
figure_files.figure_m4b_site_umap_exp7a.png: M4b — Site-resolved atomic embedding analysis (site UMAP, multi-task baseline)
figure_files.figure_m4b_site_umap_exp7c.png: M4b — Site-resolved atomic embedding analysis (site UMAP, single-task pretrained variant)
